title: The Unselfish Gene
subtitle: A psychologist gives his view on how humans became self-centred

phrases.def: 《自私的基因》（理查德·道金斯1976年著作）
进化适应环境（人类特征据信在此形成的史前环境）
昆申人（南部非洲的狩猎采集族群）

sentences.en: There has long been a general assumption that human beings are essentially selfish.
sentences.zh: 长期以来，人们普遍假定人类本质上是自私的。

grammar.type: 同位语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 There has long been a general assumption；that human beings are essentially selfish 为同位语从句，说明 assumption 的具体内容；has long been 用现在完成时表“长期以来一直”。

sentences.en: We're apparently ruthless, with strong impulses to compete against each other for resources and to accumulate power and possessions.
sentences.zh: 我们显然是冷酷无情的，有着强烈的冲动去彼此争夺资源、积聚权力和财富。

grammar.type: 主系表 + with 介词短语作状语
grammar.note: 主干是 We're apparently ruthless；with strong impulses... 为伴随状语，说明这种冷酷的表现；两个不定式 to compete against... 与 to accumulate... 并列，作 impulses 的后置定语。

sentences.en: If we are kind to one another, it's usually because we have ulterior motives.
sentences.zh: 如果我们对彼此友善，通常是因为我们有不可告人的动机。

grammar.type: If 条件状语从句 + 表语从句
grammar.note: If we are kind to one another 为条件状语从句；主句 it's usually because... 中，because 引导表语从句解释原因；one another 表“彼此”。

sentences.en: If we are good, it's only because we have managed to control and transcend our innate selfishness and brutality.
sentences.zh: 如果我们向善，那也只是因为我们设法控制并超越了自身与生俱来的自私和野蛮。

grammar.type: If 条件状语从句 + 表语从句
grammar.note: 结构与上句平行，If we are good 为条件从句；主句 it's only because... 用 because 引导表语从句；managed to control and transcend 为并列不定式；innate 修饰 selfishness and brutality。

sentences.en: This bleak view of human nature is closely associated with the science writer Richard Dawkins, whose 1976 book The Selfish Gene became popular because it fitted so well with – and helped to justify – the competitive and individualistic ethos that was so prevalent in late 20th-century societies.
sentences.zh: 这种对人性的悲观看法与科普作家理查德·道金斯密切相关，他1976年的著作《自私的基因》之所以流行，是因为它与20世纪晚期社会中盛行的竞争性、个人主义的思潮如此契合——并且有助于为其提供正当理由。

grammar.type: 非限制性定语从句 + so...that 隐含 + 定语从句嵌套
grammar.note: 主干是 This bleak view... is closely associated with... Richard Dawkins；whose 1976 book The Selfish Gene became popular 为非限制性定语从句；because 引导原因状语从句，其中破折号间 and helped to justify 为插入补充；that was so prevalent... 为定语从句修饰 ethos。

sentences.en: Like many others, Dawkins justifies his views with reference to the field of evolutionary psychology.
sentences.zh: 和许多人一样，道金斯借助进化心理学这一领域来为自己的观点辩护。

grammar.type: 主谓宾 + 介词短语作状语
grammar.note: Like many others 为方式状语；主干是 Dawkins justifies his views；with reference to... 意为“参照、借助于”，引出其依据的领域 evolutionary psychology。

sentences.en: Evolutionary psychology theorises that present-day human traits developed in prehistoric times, during what is termed the 'environment of evolutionary adaptedness'.
sentences.zh: 进化心理学提出这样的理论：当今的人类特征形成于史前时期，即所谓的“进化适应环境”之中。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + what 引导的名词性从句
grammar.note: 主干是 Evolutionary psychology theorises that...，that 引导宾语从句；从句主干 present-day human traits developed in prehistoric times；during what is termed... 中 what 引导名词性从句作 during 的宾语，term 表“把……称为”。

words.def: 提出理论；从理论上分析

sentences.en: Prehistory is usually seen as a period of intense competition, when life was such a brutal battle that only those with traits such as selfishness, aggression and ruthlessness survived.
sentences.zh: 史前时期通常被看作一个竞争激烈的时代，当时生活是一场如此残酷的搏斗，以至于只有具备自私、好斗和冷酷等特质的人才能存活下来。

grammar.type: 被动语态 + when 定语从句 + such...that 结果状语
grammar.note: 主干是 Prehistory is usually seen as a period of intense competition；when 引导定语从句修饰 period；从句内 such a brutal battle that... 为 such...that 结果结构，only those with traits... survived 为该结果从句主干。

sentences.en: And because survival depended on access to resources – such as rivers, forests and animals – there was bound to be conflict between rival groups, which led to the development of traits such as racism and warfare.
sentences.zh: 而且，由于生存依赖于对资源——如河流、森林和动物——的获取，敌对群体之间必然会发生冲突，这又导致了种族主义和战争等特质的形成。

grammar.type: because 原因状语从句 + 非限制性定语从句
grammar.note: because survival depended on access to resources 为原因从句，破折号间为对 resources 的举例；主句 there was bound to be conflict...，be bound to 表“必然、注定”；which led to... 为非限制性定语从句，指代前面整件事。

sentences.en: This seems logical.
sentences.zh: 这看起来合乎逻辑。

grammar.type: 主系表
grammar.note: 简单句，主干是 This seems logical；seem 为系动词后接形容词表语；This 回指上文那套“史前残酷竞争”的推论。

sentences.en: But, in fact, the assumption on which this all rests – that prehistoric life was a desperate struggle for survival – is false.
sentences.zh: 但事实上，这一切所依据的那个假设——即史前生活是一场为求生存的殊死挣扎——是错误的。

grammar.type: 介词+which 定语从句 + 同位语插入
grammar.note: 主干是 the assumption... is false；on which this all rests 为“介词+which”定语从句修饰 assumption；破折号间 that prehistoric life was a desperate struggle for survival 为同位语从句，解释该 assumption 的内容。

sentences.en: It's important to remember that in the prehistoric era, the world was very sparsely populated.
sentences.zh: 重要的是要记住，在史前时代，世界上的人口非常稀少。

grammar.type: 形式主语 + 宾语从句
grammar.note: It's important to remember that... 用 it 作形式主语，真正主语是 to remember 不定式；that 引导 remember 的宾语从句；sparsely populated 表“人口稀疏地分布”。

sentences.en: According to some estimates, around 15,000 years ago, the population of Europe was only 29,000, and the population of the whole world was less than half a million.
sentences.zh: 据一些估计，大约15,000年前，欧洲的人口只有29,000，而全世界的人口还不到五十万。

grammar.type: 并列句 + 介词短语作状语
grammar.note: According to some estimates 与 around 15,000 years ago 均为状语；主体是由 and 连接的两个并列分句，分别陈述欧洲人口 was only 29,000 与全世界人口 was less than half a million。

sentences.en: Humans at that time were hunter-gatherers: people who lived by hunting wild animals and collecting wild plants.
sentences.zh: 那时的人类是狩猎采集者：靠猎取野生动物和采集野生植物为生的人。

grammar.type: 主系表 + 冒号解释 + 定语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 Humans at that time were hunter-gatherers；冒号后 people who... 对 hunter-gatherers 作解释性同位语；who lived by... 为定语从句，live by doing 表“靠做某事为生”。

sentences.en: With such small population densities, it seems unlikely that prehistoric hunter-gatherer groups had to compete against each other for resources or had any need to develop ruthlessness and competitiveness, or to go to war.
sentences.zh: 在人口密度如此之低的情况下，史前狩猎采集群体似乎不太可能必须彼此争夺资源，也没有什么必要去发展冷酷和好胜的性格，或去发动战争。

grammar.type: 形式主语 + 主语从句 + 并列谓语
grammar.note: With such small population densities 为伴随状语；it seems unlikely that... 用 it 作形式主语，that 引导主语从句；从句内 had to compete... 与 had any need to develop... 为并列谓语，末尾 or to go to war 与前面不定式并列。

sentences.en: There is significant evidence to back this notion from contemporary hunter-gatherer groups, who live in the same way as prehistoric humans did.
sentences.zh: 来自当代狩猎采集群体的大量证据可以支持这一看法，这些群体的生活方式与史前人类相同。

grammar.type: There be + 不定式作定语 + 非限制性定语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 There is significant evidence；to back this notion 为不定式作后置定语修饰 evidence；from contemporary hunter-gatherer groups 说明证据来源；who live in the same way as... 为非限制性定语从句，as 引导比较状语从句。

sentences.en: As the anthropologist Bruce Knauft has remarked, hunter-gatherers are characterised by 'extreme political and sexual egalitarianism'.
sentences.zh: 正如人类学家布鲁斯·克瑙夫特所指出的，狩猎采集者的特点是“极端的政治与两性平等”。

grammar.type: As 引导方式状语从句 + 被动语态
grammar.note: As the anthropologist Bruce Knauft has remarked 为 as 引导的非限制性方式状语从句；主句 hunter-gatherers are characterised by...，be characterised by 表“以……为特征”；引号内为其原话。

sentences.en: Knauft has observed that individuals in such groups don't accumulate property or possessions and have an ethical obligation to share everything.
sentences.zh: 克瑙夫特观察到，这类群体中的个人不积累财产或财物，并且有分享一切的道德义务。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 并列谓语
grammar.note: 主干是 Knauft has observed that...，that 引导宾语从句；从句主语 individuals in such groups 后接由 and 连接的并列谓语 don't accumulate... 与 have an ethical obligation to share everything。

sentences.en: They also have methods of preserving egalitarianism by ensuring that disparities of status don't arise.
sentences.zh: 他们还有一些维护平等的方法，即确保不会出现地位上的差异。

grammar.type: 主谓宾 + 动名词短语作状语
grammar.note: 主干是 They also have methods of preserving egalitarianism；by ensuring that... 为方式状语，动名词 ensuring 后接宾语从句 that disparities of status don't arise。

sentences.en: The !Kung people of southern Africa, for example, swap arrows before going hunting and when an animal is killed, the acclaim does not go to the person who fired the arrow, but to the person the arrow belongs to.
sentences.zh: 例如，南部非洲的昆申人在外出狩猎前会互换箭矢，当猎物被射杀时，赞誉并不归于射箭的人，而是归于那支箭的主人。

grammar.type: 并列句 + when 状语从句 + not...but 结构 + 定语从句
grammar.note: 前半 The !Kung people... swap arrows before going hunting；and 后 when an animal is killed 为时间状语从句，主句 the acclaim does not go to... but to...，not...but 连接两个 to 短语；who fired the arrow 及省略关系词的 the arrow belongs to 分别修饰两个 person。

sentences.en: And if a person becomes too domineering, the other members of the group ostracise them, exiling the offender from society.
sentences.zh: 而如果某个人变得过于专横霸道，群体中的其他成员就会排斥他，把这个冒犯者逐出社会。

grammar.type: if 条件状语从句 + 现在分词短语作结果状语
grammar.note: if a person becomes too domineering 为条件从句；主句 the other members... ostracise them；exiling the offender from society 为现在分词短语作结果状语，补充说明排斥的具体做法。

sentences.en: Typically in such groups, men do not dictate what women do.
sentences.zh: 在这类群体中，男性通常不会支配女性的行为。

grammar.type: 主谓宾 + 宾语从句
grammar.note: Typically in such groups 为状语；主干是 men do not dictate...；dictate 后接 what women do 这一宾语从句；dictate 此处表“对……发号施令、支配”。

sentences.en: Women in hunter-gatherer groups worldwide often benefit from a high level of autonomy, being able to select their own marriage partners, decide what work they do and work whenever they choose to.
sentences.zh: 世界各地狩猎采集群体中的女性往往享有高度的自主权，能够自行选择婚姻伴侣、决定自己做什么工作以及随心所欲地选择何时工作。

grammar.type: 主谓宾 + 现在分词短语作状语
grammar.note: 主干是 Women... often benefit from a high level of autonomy；being able to... 为现在分词短语作伴随状语；其后 select..., decide... 与 work... 为三个并列的不定式内容，说明自主权的体现。

sentences.en: And if a marriage breaks down, they have custody rights over their children.
sentences.zh: 而且，如果婚姻破裂，她们对自己的孩子拥有监护权。

grammar.type: if 条件状语从句 + 主谓宾
grammar.note: if a marriage breaks down 为条件状语从句，break down 表“破裂”；主句 they have custody rights over their children，custody rights over 表“对……的监护权”。

sentences.en: Many anthropologists believe that societies such as the !Kung were normal until a few thousand years ago, when population growth led to the development of agriculture and a settled lifestyle.
sentences.zh: 许多人类学家认为，像昆申人这样的社会在几千年前一直是常态，直到人口增长促成了农业和定居生活方式的出现。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + until 时间状语 + when 定语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 Many anthropologists believe that...，that 引导宾语从句；从句 societies... were normal until a few thousand years ago；when population growth led to... 为非限制性定语从句修饰 a few thousand years ago。

sentences.en: In view of the above, there seems little reason to assume that traits such as racism, warfare and male domination should have been selected by evolution – as they would have been of little benefit in the prehistoric era.
sentences.zh: 鉴于上述情况，似乎没有什么理由认为种族主义、战争和男性支配等特质会被进化所选择——因为它们在史前时代几乎没有什么益处。

grammar.type: There be + 不定式 + 宾语从句 + as 原因状语从句
grammar.note: In view of the above 为状语；主干 there seems little reason to assume that...，to assume 后接宾语从句；从句谓语 should have been selected 为“情态动词+完成被动”表对过去的推测；破折号后 as they would have been... 为原因状语从句。

sentences.en: Individuals who behaved selfishly and ruthlessly would be less likely to survive, since they would have been ostracised from their groups.
sentences.zh: 那些行为自私、冷酷的个人存活下来的可能性会更小，因为他们会被逐出自己的群体。

grammar.type: 定语从句 + since 原因状语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 Individuals... would be less likely to survive；who behaved selfishly and ruthlessly 为定语从句修饰 Individuals；since 引导原因状语从句，would have been ostracised 为“情态动词+完成被动”。

sentences.en: It makes more sense, then, to see traits such as cooperation, egalitarianism, altruism and peacefulness as innate characteristics of human beings.
sentences.zh: 因此，把合作、平等、利他和爱好和平等特质看作人类与生俱来的特性，才更为合理。

grammar.type: 形式主语 + 不定式真主语
grammar.note: It makes more sense to see... 用 it 作形式主语，真正主语是 to see 不定式；then 为插入的连接副词；see A as B 表“把 A 视为 B”，A 为并列的四种特质，B 为 innate characteristics。

sentences.en: These were the traits that were prevalent in human life for tens of thousands of years.
sentences.zh: 这些正是在数万年间人类生活中普遍存在的特质。

grammar.type: 主系表 + 定语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 These were the traits；that were prevalent in human life... 为定语从句修饰 the traits；for tens of thousands of years 为时间状语，表持续时间。

sentences.en: So presumably these traits are still strong in us now.
sentences.zh: 因此，这些特质如今大概在我们身上依然强烈存在。

grammar.type: 主系表 + 副词插入
grammar.note: So 表结果承接上文；presumably 为评注性副词，表“大概、想必”；主干是 these traits are still strong in us now。

sentences.en: But if prehistoric life wasn't really as brutal as has often been assumed, why do modern humans behave so selfishly and ruthlessly?
sentences.zh: 但是，如果史前生活并不像人们通常所设想的那样残酷，那么现代人为什么会表现得如此自私和冷酷呢？

grammar.type: if 条件状语从句 + as...as 比较 + 疑问句
grammar.note: if 引导条件从句 prehistoric life wasn't really as brutal as...，as...as 为同级比较，as has often been assumed 中省略主语 it；主句为特殊疑问句 why do modern humans behave so...。

sentences.en: Perhaps these negative traits should be seen as a later development, the result of environmental and psychological factors.
sentences.zh: 也许这些负面特质应被视为一种较晚的产物，是环境与心理因素造成的结果。

grammar.type: 情态被动 + 同位语
grammar.note: Perhaps 为评注副词；主干是 these negative traits should be seen as a later development，为情态动词被动；the result of environmental and psychological factors 为 a later development 的同位语，进一步说明其性质。

sentences.en: Research has shown repeatedly that when the natural habitats of primates such as apes and gorillas are disrupted, they tend to become more violent and hierarchical.
sentences.zh: 研究反复表明，当类人猿和大猩猩等灵长类动物的自然栖息地遭到破坏时，它们往往会变得更加暴力，也更具等级性。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + when 时间状语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 Research has shown repeatedly that...，that 引导宾语从句；从句内 when the natural habitats... are disrupted 为时间状语从句（被动），主句 they tend to become more violent and hierarchical。

sentences.en: So, it could well be that the same thing has happened to us.
sentences.zh: 因此，很有可能同样的事情也发生在了我们身上。

grammar.type: 形式主语 + 表语从句
grammar.note: So 承接上文；it could well be that... 用 it 作形式主语，that 引导表语从句；could well 表“很可能”，加强推测语气。

sentences.en: I believe that the end of the hunter-gatherer lifestyle and the advent of farming was connected to a psychological change that occurred in some groups of people.
sentences.zh: 我认为，狩猎采集生活方式的终结和农业的到来，与发生在某些人群中的一种心理变化有关。

grammar.type: 宾语从句 + 被动语态 + 定语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 I believe that...，that 引导宾语从句；从句主语为并列的 the end of... and the advent of farming，谓语 was connected to a psychological change；that occurred in some groups of people 为定语从句修饰 change。

sentences.en: There was a new sense of individuality and separateness, which led to a new selfishness, and ultimately to hierarchical societies, patriarchy and warfare.
sentences.zh: 出现了一种全新的个体意识与分离感，它引发了一种新的自私，并最终导致了等级社会、父权制和战争。

grammar.type: There be + 非限制性定语从句
grammar.note: 主干是 There was a new sense of individuality and separateness；which led to... 为非限制性定语从句，指代前面这种意识；从句谓语 led to 后接并列宾语 a new selfishness 与 (to) hierarchical societies, patriarchy and warfare。

sentences.en: At any rate, these negative traits appear to have developed so recently that it doesn't seem feasible to explain them in adaptive or evolutionary terms.
sentences.zh: 无论如何，这些负面特质似乎是如此晚近才形成的，以至于用适应性或进化的角度来解释它们看来并不可行。

grammar.type: so...that 结果状语从句 + 形式主语
grammar.note: At any rate 为插入语“无论如何”；主干是 these negative traits appear to have developed so recently；so...that 引出结果从句 that it doesn't seem feasible to explain them...，其中 it 作形式主语，to explain 为真主语。

questions.title: Questions 27-30 · Multiple choice
instructions: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
Write the correct letter in boxes 27-30 on your answer sheet.

items.prompt: What is the writer doing in the first paragraph?
options: A setting out two opposing views about human nature
B justifying his opinion about our tendency to be greedy
C describing a commonly held belief about people's behaviour
D explaining why he thinks that humans act in a selfish manner

items.prompt: What point is made about Richard Dawkins' book The Selfish Gene?
options: A Its appeal lay in the radical nature of its ideas.
B Its success was due to the scientific support it offered.
C It presented a view that was in line with the attitudes of its time.
D It took an innovative approach to the analysis of human psychology.

items.prompt: What does the writer suggest about the prehistoric era in the fourth paragraph?
options: A Societies were more complex than many people believe.
B Supplies of natural resources were probably relatively plentiful.
C Most estimates about population sizes are likely to be inaccurate.
D Humans moved across continents more than was previously thought.

items.prompt: The writer refers to Bruce Knauft's work as support for the idea that
options: A selfishness is a relatively recent development in human societies.
B only people in isolated communities can live in an unselfish manner.
C very few lifestyles have survived unchanged since prehistoric times.
D hunter-gatherer cultures worldwide are declining in number.

questions.title: Questions 31-35 · Summary completion
instructions: Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
Write your answers in boxes 31-35 on your answer sheet.

items.prompt: Bruce Knauft's research shows that contemporary hunter-gatherer societies tend to exhibit a high level of 31 ____ in all areas of life.
These societies also employ strategies to prevent differences in 32 ____ occurring:
for example, the !Kung follow a custom whereby the credit for one person's success at 33 ____ is given to another member of the group.
Individuals who behave in a 34 ____ manner are punished by being excluded from the group,
and women have a considerable amount of 35 ____ in choices regarding work and marriage.

questions.title: Questions 36-40 · YES / NO / NOT GIVEN
instructions: Do the following statements agree with the views of the writer in Reading Passage 3?
In boxes 36-40 on your answer sheet, write
YES if the statement agrees with the views of the writer
NO if the statement contradicts the views of the writer
NOT GIVEN if it is impossible to say what the writer thinks about this

items.prompt: Some anthropologists are mistaken about the point when the number of societies such as the !Kung began to decline.
Humans who developed warlike traits in prehistory would have had an advantage over those who did not.
Being peaceful and cooperative is a natural way for people to behave.
Negative traits are more apparent in some modern cultures than in others.
Animal research has failed to reveal a link between changes in the environment and the emergence of aggressive tendencies.
